name: part_014
file: tmp_【3D LIVE CONCERT 生誕ライブ】FUWAMOCO wacha wacha birthday festival 🎂🐾 【#FWMCbday26】 [7M4E3WGWlRM]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_014.webm

scenes.description: Fuwawa and Mococo address the audience, reflecting on their journey and introducing the final song of their birthday concert.
Fuwawa and Mococo perform their original song 'Wishful☆Garnet'.

subtitles.original: This next song...
subtitles.english: This next song...

subtitles.original: ...is our last song!
subtitles.english: ...is our last song!

subtitles.original: But like all of them, it's a very special one.
subtitles.english: But like all of them, it's a very special one.

subtitles.original: You know FUWAMOCO...
subtitles.english: You know FUWAMOCO...

subtitles.original: ...is Demon Guard Dogs!
subtitles.english: ...is Demon Guard Dogs!

subtitles.original: We're here to protect your smile, right?
subtitles.english: We're here to protect your smile, right?

subtitles.original: We'll continue to do that.
subtitles.english: We'll continue to do that.

subtitles.original: Protect your smile!
subtitles.english: Protect your smile!

subtitles.original: Yeah!
subtitles.english: Yeah!

subtitles.original: Do our best as idols!
subtitles.english: Do our best as idols!

subtitles.original: And just as our fluffy and fuzzy souls, too.
subtitles.english: And just as our fluffy and fuzzy souls, too.

subtitles.original:
We'll continue to be here for
thousands and thousands of demon dog years.
subtitles.english:
We'll continue to be here for
thousands and thousands of demon dog years.

subtitles.original:
All while remembering that, you know,
every day isn't given.
subtitles.english:
All while remembering that, you know,
every day isn't given.

subtitles.original: Yeah!
subtitles.english: Yeah!

subtitles.original: We don't take anything for granted.
subtitles.english: We don't take anything for granted.

subtitles.original:
And you know, when you're down,
we hope that you'll remember...
subtitles.english:
And you know, when you're down,
we hope that you'll remember...

subtitles.original: ...that we're always here cheering you on, okay?
subtitles.english: ...that we're always here cheering you on, okay?

subtitles.original: We'll cheer you on, Ruffians!
subtitles.english: We'll cheer you on, Ruffians!

subtitles.original:
So please listen closely to the lyrics
of our last song for today.
subtitles.english:
So please listen closely to the lyrics
of our last song for today.

subtitles.original: 明日も　明後日も
subtitles.english: Tomorrow, and the day after too,

subtitles.original: あなたが笑ってますように　ずっと
subtitles.english: I hope you'll keep on smiling forever.

subtitles.original: Lala...
subtitles.english: Lala...

subtitles.original:
Thank you so much Ruffians for
spending our birthday with us today!
subtitles.english:
Thank you so much Ruffians for
spending our birthday with us today!

subtitles.original: Please think of this song whenever things are rough...
subtitles.english: Please think of this song whenever things are rough...

subtitles.original: ...and know we'll be here!
subtitles.english: ...and know we'll be here!

subtitles.original: This last song is for you, Wishful☆Garnet!
subtitles.english: This last song is for you, Wishful☆Garnet!

subtitles.original: 過去を振り返ると
subtitles.english: When I look back at the past,

subtitles.original: 思い出すガーネットの空
subtitles.english: I remember the Garnet sky.

subtitles.original: 溢れてく　光
subtitles.english: The light overflows.

subtitles.original: この瞳に映し出されたあの日は
subtitles.english: That day reflected in these eyes

subtitles.original: 美しく　揺れる
subtitles.english: sways beautifully.

subtitles.original: What do you think?
subtitles.english: What do you think?

subtitles.original: 赤く滲んだ空に
subtitles.english: In the sky tinged with red,

subtitles.original: 願いました　どうかこの願い　届けてください
subtitles.english: I made a wish. Please, let this wish reach you.

subtitles.original: 明日も　明後日も
subtitles.english: Tomorrow, and the day after too,

subtitles.original: あなたが笑ってますように
subtitles.english: I hope you'll keep on smiling.

subtitles.original: 離れ離れになっても　前を向けますように
subtitles.english: Even if we are far apart, I hope you can look forward.

subtitles.original: あなたを縛る鎖を　わたしが壊してあげる
subtitles.english: The chains that bind you, I will break them for you.

subtitles.original: もう負けないで進むこと　いつでもそばにいるから
subtitles.english:
Keep moving forward without losing,
because I'll always be by your side.

subtitles.original: 落ち込んだり自信を無くした時だって
subtitles.english: Even when I felt down or lost my confidence,

subtitles.original: 目の前にいてくれる
subtitles.english: you were right there in front of me.

subtitles.original: あなたの笑顔に何度となく　救われた
subtitles.english: I've been saved by your smile time and time again.

subtitles.original: だから
subtitles.english: That's why,

subtitles.original: So I love you
subtitles.english: So I love you

subtitles.original: 挫けそうになったら　手を伸ばして
subtitles.english: If you feel like giving up, just reach out your hand.

subtitles.original: まだ知らない明日　一緒に見つけよう
subtitles.english: Let's find the unknown tomorrow together.

subtitles.original: 明日も　明後日も　あなたを照らしていたい
subtitles.english: Tomorrow, and the day after too, I want to keep shining on you.

subtitles.original: 泣きそうになった時は　こっち向いてほしい
subtitles.english: When you feel like crying, please look my way.

subtitles.original: 世界でひとりのぼっち　そんな風に思わないで
subtitles.english: Don't ever think that you're alone in the world.

subtitles.original: 愛してくれる人はきっと　いつもあなたを想ってる
subtitles.english:
There's surely someone who loves you,
and is always thinking of you.

subtitles.original: Lala...
subtitles.english: Lala...

subtitles.original: 願いました　どうかこの願い　届けてください
subtitles.english: I made a wish. Please, let this wish reach you.

subtitles.original: 明日も　明後日も
subtitles.english: Tomorrow, and the day after too,

subtitles.original: あなたが笑ってますように
subtitles.english: I hope you'll keep on smiling.

subtitles.original: 離れ離れになっても　前を向けますように
subtitles.english: Even if we are far apart, I hope you can look forward.

subtitles.original: あなたを縛る鎖を　わたしが壊してあげる
subtitles.english: The chains that bind you, I will break them for you.

subtitles.original: もう負けないで進むこと
subtitles.english: Keep moving forward without losing,

subtitles.original: 輝く空へ
subtitles.english: to the shining sky.

subtitles.original: 明日も　明後日も
subtitles.english: Tomorrow, and the day after too,

subtitles.original: あなたが笑ってますように
subtitles.english: I hope you'll keep on smiling.
